sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76620" key="paidoko/rac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παιδο-κόραξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n76620.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boy-raven</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">greedy after boys</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θυμός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.42</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
